history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A colorful stylized graphic fills the image with Indonesian text and decorative emoji-like elements.  

Main Subject:  
The main focus is large, overlapping text in multiple colors and styles, alongside a gold/yellow hands-together icon and a smiling face with a closed-eye expression.  

Setting:  
The setting is a plain, solid black background with no visible environment beyond the graphic elements.  

Visual Details:  
The layout features stacked, bubble-like text in varying sizes: the top line is in light blue with a thick white outline reading “selamat pagi,” the next line is in bright pink with a white highlight reading “bersyukur,” and a red outlined word “semangat” appears below. A large white phrase “itu awal tuk” is placed beneath, followed by a yellow word “bahagia” with a red outline and a thick, rounded style. At the right side, a blue cursive-style word “hari ini…” appears with white outlines. On the left, a gold/yellow hands-together icon is positioned near the top; on the right, a yellow smiley face with a curved mouth and closed eyes sits near the red “semangat” area. Lighting is flat, with high-contrast, saturated colors and thick outlines for a poster-like look, viewed straight-on.  

Visible Text:  
selamat pagi  
bersyukur &  
semangat  
itu awal tuk  
bahagia  
hari ini...  

Practical Summary:  
The image is a black background with large, colorful Indonesian greeting text layered in bubble and cursive styles. It includes decorative icons, including hands-together and a smiling face.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

selamat pagi  
bersyukur &  
semangat  
itu awal tuk  
bahagia  
hari ini...

# Structured Version

- selamat pagi  
- bersyukur &  
- semangat  
- itu awal tuk  
- bahagia  
- hari ini...  

# Notes

- The line breaks and capitalization match the screenshot as closely as possible.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
